items.title: President, TEIN – Kings University College
items.org: Tertiary Education Institutional Network of NDC (National Democratic Congress)
items.description: Serves as President of the TEIN branch at Kings University College — the tertiary youth wing of the governing National Democratic Congress. Although studies at KUC have been completed, continues in office pending elections to elect a successor and ensure a smooth transition of leadership.

items.title: Legal Affairs Commissioner
items.description: Served as Chief Legal Counsel and Chairperson of the Legal Affairs Commission. Represented Executive, Parliamentary, and Judicial Councils at hearings; provided legal defence to students appearing before the Disciplinary Board. Role concluded upon graduation from Kings University College in May 2026.

items.title: Vice President, Law Students' Union
items.description: Spearheaded transformative initiatives — sole sponsor and developer of the LSU website and Dr. Attakora Legal Tree. Coached the LSU delegation to the Sarah F. Kpodo International Moot Court Competition; led Prestige Chamber to victory in moot court preliminaries.

items.title: Company Secretary / Administrator
items.description: Manages comprehensive property portfolios across Greater Accra. Implemented digital systems improving operational efficiency by 40%. Conducts market analysis and property valuations for strategic portfolio decisions.

items.title: President, Adom Community League
items.description: Leads comprehensive community development initiatives and advocacy programmes. Established partnerships with over 15 community organisations, improving service delivery for underserved populations in education, healthcare, and economic empowerment.

items.title: Board Member
items.description: Provides strategic oversight and governance for legal services firm. Contributes to business development and client relationship management.

items.title: Company Secretary
items.description: Ensures comprehensive corporate compliance. Manages board communications, statutory filings with the Registrar General's Department, and regulatory compliance including tax filings and annual returns.

items.title: Administrative Manager
items.description: Directs administrative functions, supervises support staff, and implements operational procedures. Oversees budget administration, HR support, and technology solutions for administrative efficiency.

items.title: Chairman, West African Committee
items.description: Leads regional student advocacy across 20+ African countries. Organises the annual West African Student Leadership Summit, bringing together 500+ student leaders for capacity building and networking.

items.title: President, University Student Chamber Ghana
items.description: Represents Ghanaian students in national and international forums. Advocates for quality education and student welfare, and coordinates with Ghana's Ministry of Education on higher education policy.

items.title: Owner / General Manager
items.description: Founded and manages a diversified business venture encompassing consulting services, investment opportunities, and strategic partnerships across multiple sectors since 2017.

items.title: Personal & Research Assistant to the MP
items.description: Seven-year tenure conducting legislative research and policy analysis. Managed extensive constituent relations and played a pivotal role in the 2016 parliamentary seat victory — developing the results collation system deployed at both party headquarters and the EC Collation Centre.
